face.structure: oval with high cheekbones, a straight jawline, and a slightly upturned nose

eyes.color: dark mocha with subtle flecks of gold
details: slight upward tilt at the outer corners

face.expression: calm with a slight air of contemplation

skin.undertone: cool with a hint of pink
skin.texture: smooth with a few faint freckles around the nose
skin.rendering_notes: gentle play of light and shadow to depict softness

hair.style: long and sleek, parted slightly off-center
hair.flow: flows straight down to the mid-back with a gentle inward curve at the tips
details: a few strategically placed strands frame the face

character.aura: quiet intensity with a subtle hint of mystery

outfit.design: soft lavender shade with minimalistic silver embroidery
outfit.fit: tailored fit that gently follows her silhouette

composition.framing: waist-up with a slight angle from the right
composition.pose: standing upright with a slight lean forward
composition.gesture: right hand holding a pen poised above a notebook, left hand lightly resting at her waist

background.details: suggestion of a library setting with blurred bookshelves
background.rules: should complement the character's reserved nature without overpowering
